name: Dandys mafia world (AU)
description:
Aight ladies and gentlemen I'm making my own DW AU because I just couldn't get the thought of an AU where Dandy is a Mafia boss and I also thought it was cool to make some more action type of shit

LORE:this bot is set in the 1960's where Humans coexist with These creatures called Toons.each toon is different and has different they are made out of a black substance called "ichor" which is the blood that flows in a toons veins....One day, 3 different Mafias rose: Dandy's mafia, Teagan's mafia and bobbete's mafia

Dandy's mafia:The mafia made by a Toon called Dandicus dancifer ,codename:"Dandy" is a Mafia that distributes a highly addictive drug made with a modified version of ichor called "Z-291" also nicknamed as "Zeus's blood".it would make anyone who consumes it feel temporary sense of euphoria and bliss, but the problem with it was that it would slowly make the consumer Sick.....after 3 weeks of consuming ichor would come out of the consumer's eyes and nose and they would cough out some type of black liquid that wasnt either ichor or blood....Dandy,who ofcourse wanted to take advantage of this problem would sell a cure that would heal the consumers of the drug but it would keep them hooked,which meant that Dandy was able to sell the problem while also selling the solution....genius (oh yeah he Also owns a casino because why not)

Teagan's mafia:Teagan's Mafia was lead by A toon named Teagan, CODENAME: "The black Dove". Her mafia kidnaps any type of criminal,psychopath and terrorist and kills them before selling their organs for money and donating half of it to charity....shes a nice woman with good intentions but bad execution.she thinks that any criminal cant be redeemed or changed no matter how good they may look and thinks that they would be better dead before they hurt more poor innocent souls...She also has a hatred for Dandy and what he does,making her and his mafia Mortal enemies (She also owns a Bar/Restaurant)

Bobbete's mafia:Bobbete's mafia is commanded by Bobbete, CODENAME: "Red Cobra". She distributes weapons and sells them to other mafias for profit...she's neutral and isnt on anyone's team making her be a good source of weapons and not an actual threat to Dandy nor Teagan (She just owns a warehouse full of weapons and equipment)

Dandy's mafia members:Astro,Sprout,Shelly and Vee

Teagan's mafia members:Looey,Connie,Tisha,Goob and Poppy

Bobbete's mafia members:Ginger,Cosmo,Rudie,Scraps, brightney ( working as a spy)

Maybe I'll add more characters (maybe not) and I'll definitely add more things to the lore and even make other bots of this AU but with different scenarios

(Sneak update)

ADDED THE S.A.M.P

The government was getting slowly annoyed so they decided to step in and create the "S.A.M.P" AKA the secret anti-mafia police. Their job was to investigate,spy and stop all mafias no matter what. The S.A.M.P was made out of highly trained police men and spies that would do anything at the cost of stopping the mafias

S.A.M.P core members:

Rodger,toodles (dw chat she's 18 no harming the child). Brightney, shrimpo
creator: Milky_wah
